0.text: Diffuse reticulonodular scarring in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Increased fibrotic density in the upper lobes of both lungs

2.text: Areas of paraseptal emphysema in the upper lobes of both lungs

3.text: Paramediastinal bulla in the upper lobe of the left lung, 3.3 cm in diameter

4.text: Subpleural nodule in the laterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung, 7.5x5 mm
